message.content:
You are implementing Task 14: 前端考生端页面

## Task Description

**Files to Create (all under exam-web/src/):**
- `hooks/use-exams.ts`
- `hooks/use-records.ts`
- `components/exam-card.tsx`
- `components/countdown-timer.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/exams/index.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/exams/$id.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/exams/$id.take.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/records/index.tsx`
- `routes/_layout/records/$id.tsx`

## Existing Code Context

**lib/api.ts:** get<T>(url), post<T>(url, body), put<T>(url, body), del<T>(url, body)

**types/index.ts:**
```typescript
type ExamStatus = "draft" | "published" | "closed"
type AccessMode = "open" | "whitelist"
type RecordStatus = "in_progress" | "submitted" | "timeout"
interface Exam { id, title, status, timeLimitMin, showAnswer, showAnalysis, questionCount, maxAttempts, accessMode, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt }
interface ExamRecord { id, examId, userId, score, startTime, endTime, status, attemptNo }
interface Question { id, examId, content, optionA~D, correctAnswer?, analysis?, sortOrder }
interface AnswerDetail { id, recordId, questionId, userAnswer, isCorrect }
interface PageResult<T> { records, total, current, size }
```

**UI components available:** button, input, badge, dialog, radio-group, table, tabs, separator, label

**lib/utils.ts:** cn()

**i18n:** useTranslation()

## API Responses (from backend)

**GET /api/exams** → PageResult<ExamDetailResponse>
ExamDetailResponse: { id, title, status, timeLimitMin, questionCount, maxAttempts, showAnswer, showAnalysis, accessMode, remainingAttempts: number|null }

**GET /api/exams/{id}** → ExamDetailResponse (same as above)

**POST /api/exams/{id}/start** → { recordId: number, questions: [{ id, content, optionA, optionB, optionC, optionD, sortOrder }] }

**POST /api/exams/{id}/submit** → { score: number, status: string } (body: { recordId, answers: [{questionId, answer}] })

**GET /api/records** → PageResult<RecordDetailResponse>
RecordDetailResponse: { id, examId, examTitle, score, startTime, endTime, status, attemptNo, answers?: [...] }

**GET /api/records/{id}** → RecordDetailResponse with answers: [{ questionId, content, optionA~D, userAnswer, isCorrect, correctAnswer?, analysis? }]

## Detailed Requirements

### hooks/use-exams.ts
```typescript
// Types for API responses
interface ExamDetail {
  id: number; title: string; status: string; timeLimitMin: number;
  questionCount: number; maxAttempts: number; showAnswer: boolean;
  showAnalysis: boolean; accessMode: string; remainingAttempts: number | null;
}
interface StartExamResponse {
  recordId: number;
  questions: Array<{ id: number; content: string; optionA: string; optionB: string; optionC: string; optionD: string; sortOrder: number }>;
}
interface SubmitExamResponse { score: number; status: string }

export function useExamList(page: number, size: number)  // GET /api/exams?page=&size=
export function useExamDetail(id: number)  // GET /api/exams/{id}
export function useStartExam()  // POST /api/exams/{id}/start mutation, returns StartExamResponse
export function useSubmitExam()  // POST /api/exams/{id}/submit mutation
```

### hooks/use-records.ts
```typescript
export function useRecordList(page: number, size: number)  // GET /api/records?page=&size=
export function useRecordDetail(id: number)  // GET /api/records/{id}
```

### components/exam-card.tsx
Props: { exam: ExamDetail, onClick: () => void }
- Card layout with padding and border, hover effect
- Title (bold, truncate if long)
- Badge for status (published = green "进行中")
- Info items: 题目数: N题, 时限: N分钟 or "不限时", 剩余次数: N次 or "不限"
- Use lucide-react icons: Clock, FileQuestion, RotateCcw

### components/countdown-timer.tsx
Props: { startTime: string, timeLimitMin: number, onTimeUp: () => void }
- Calculate remaining = timeLimitMin * 60 - elapsed seconds since startTime
- useEffect with setInterval(1000ms) to decrement
- Display MM:SS format
- When remaining < 60: red text + pulse animation
- When remaining <= 0: call onTimeUp() once
- Cleanup interval on unmount

### routes/_layout/exams/index.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/exams/')
- Grid layout (1 col mobile, 2 cols md, 3 cols lg)
- Map exams to ExamCard components
- onClick → navigate to /exams/{id}
- Pagination (simple)
- Empty state: "暂无可参加的考试"

### routes/_layout/exams/$id.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/exams/$id')
- Fetch exam detail with useExamDetail
- Card with exam info: title, timeLimitMin (or 不限时), questionCount, remainingAttempts (or 不限)
- "开始考试" button
  - Disabled if remainingAttempts === 0
  - onClick → confirm dialog → startExam mutation → navigate to /exams/{id}/take with state { recordId, questions, startTime, timeLimitMin }
- Loading state

### routes/_layout/exams/$id.take.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/exams/$id/take')
- Get recordId, questions, exam info from router state or location state
- If no state, redirect back to /exams/{id}
- State: answers: Record<number, string> = {} (questionId → selected answer)
- Current question index state
- Top bar: exam title + countdown timer (if timeLimitMin > 0)
- Question display: current question number/total, content, radio buttons for A/B/C/D
- Each option shows: "A. {optionA}" as radio label
- Bottom: prev/next buttons + question number grid (clickable, colored: answered=blue, current=ring, unanswered=gray)
- Submit button: opens confirm dialog "确认提交？提交后不可修改"
- onTimeUp callback: auto-submit with current answers
- After submit success: navigate to /records/{recordId}
- Handle submit error with toast (sonner)

### routes/_layout/records/index.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/records/')
- Table: 试卷名称, 分数, 状态(Badge), 考试时间
- Status badge: submitted=default, timeout=destructive
- Score display: N分 or "-" if null
- Time display: format startTime
- Click row → navigate to /records/{id}
- Pagination

### routes/_layout/records/$id.tsx — createFileRoute('/_layout/records/$id')
- Fetch record detail with useRecordDetail
- Top summary card: score (large font), status badge, 用时 (endTime - startTime formatted)
- Answer review list:
  - For each answer: question number, content, 4 options
  - User's answer highlighted (green if correct, red if wrong)
  - If correctAnswer provided: show correct answer indicator
  - If analysis provided: show in a muted block below
- Back button to /records

## Context

Working directory: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/
All files under exam-web/src/ subdirectory.
NOT a git repo - skip commits.
Use TypeScript, import from @/ alias.
Use useTranslation() for key UI text.
Use sonner toast for success/error notifications.

## i18n additions needed in zh.json / en.json:
Add an "exam" namespace with keys for student-facing text (exam list title, start exam, submit, confirm, time's up, no exams, score, etc.)

## Report Format

When done, report:
- **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
- What you implemented
- Files changed

content.text: I'll start by understanding the existing codebase structure before implementing.

data.command: python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'git commit/push is globally prohibited.'})) if re.match(r'^git\s+(commit|push)', cmd, re.IGNORECASE) else None"

1→import { ClipboardList, History, Settings } from "lucide-react"
     2→import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"
     3→import { Link, useRouterState } from "@tanstack/react-router"
     4→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
     5→import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"
     6→
     7→interface SideNavProps {
     8→  isAdmin: boolean
     9→}
    10→
    11→interface NavItem {
    12→  icon: React.ComponentType<{ className?: string }>
    13→  labelKey: string
    14→  to: string
    15→}
    16→
    17→const userNavItems: NavItem[] = [
    18→  { icon: ClipboardList, labelKey: "nav.myExams", to: "/exams" },
    19→  { icon: History, labelKey: "nav.records", to: "/records" },
    20→]
    21→
    22→const adminNavItems: NavItem[] = [
    23→  { icon: Settings, labelKey: "nav.examManagement", to: "/admin/exams" },
    24→]
    25→
    26→export function SideNav({ isAdmin }: SideNavProps) {
    27→  const { t } = useTranslation()
    28→  const routerState = useRouterState()
    29→  const currentPath = routerState.location.pathname
    30→
    31→  return (
    32→    <aside className="flex h-full w-56 shrink-0 flex-col border-r bg-white">
    33→      <nav className="flex flex-1 flex-col gap-1 p-3">
    34→        {userNavItems.map((item) => (
    35→          <NavLink key={item.to} item={item} currentPath={currentPath} label={t(item.labelKey)} />
    36→        ))}
    37→
    38→        {isAdmin && (
    39→          <>
    40→            <Separator className="my-2" />
    41→            {adminNavItems.map((item) => (
    42→              <NavLink key={item.to} item={item} currentPath={currentPath} label={t(item.labelKey)} />
    43→            ))}
    44→          </>
    45→        )}
    46→      </nav>
    47→    </aside>
    48→  )
    49→}
    50→
    51→function NavLink({ item, currentPath, label }: { item: NavItem; currentPath: string; label: string }) {
    52→  const isActive = currentPath.startsWith(item.to)
    53→  const Icon = item.icon
    54→
    55→  return (
    56→    <Link
    57→      to={item.to}
    58→      className={cn(
    59→        "flex items-center gap-3 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground",
    60→        isActive && "bg-accent text-accent-foreground",
    61→      )}
    62→    >
    63→      <Icon className="h-4 w-4" />
    64→      {label}
    65→    </Link>
    66→  )
    67→}
    68→

1→import * as React from "react"
     2→import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"
     3→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
     4→
     5→const badgeVariants = cva(
     6→  "inline-flex items-center rounded-md border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2",
     7→  {
     8→    variants: {
     9→      variant: {
    10→        default: "border-transparent bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow",
    11→        secondary: "border-transparent bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground",
    12→        destructive: "border-transparent bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground shadow",
    13→        outline: "text-foreground",
    14→      },
    15→    },
    16→    defaultVariants: {
    17→      variant: "default",
    18→    },
    19→  },
    20→)
    21→
    22→export interface BadgeProps
    23→  extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>,
    24→    VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants> {}
    25→
    26→function Badge({ className, variant, ...props }: BadgeProps) {
    27→  return <div className={cn(badgeVariants({ variant }), className)} {...props} />
    28→}
    29→
    30→export { Badge, badgeVariants }
    31→

1→import * as React from "react"
     2→import * as RadioGroupPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-radio-group"
     3→import { Circle } from "lucide-react"
     4→import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"
     5→
     6→const RadioGroup = React.forwardRef<
     7→  React.ComponentRef<typeof RadioGroupPrimitive.Root>,
     8→  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof RadioGroupPrimitive.Root>
     9→>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
    10→  <RadioGroupPrimitive.Root className={cn("grid gap-2", className)} {...props} ref={ref} />
    11→))
    12→RadioGroup.displayName = RadioGroupPrimitive.Root.displayName
    13→
    14→const RadioGroupItem = React.forwardRef<
    15→  React.ComponentRef<typeof RadioGroupPrimitive.Item>,
    16→  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof RadioGroupPrimitive.Item>
    17→>(({ className, ...props }, ref) => (
    18→  <RadioGroupPrimitive.Item
    19→    ref={ref}
    20→    className={cn(
    21→      "aspect-square h-4 w-4 rounded-full border border-primary text-primary shadow focus:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50",
    22→      className,
    23→    )}
    24→    {...props}
    25→  >
    26→    <RadioGroupPrimitive.Indicator className="flex items-center justify-center">
    27→      <Circle className="h-2.5 w-2.5 fill-current text-current" />
    28→    </RadioGroupPrimitive.Indicator>
    29→  </RadioGroupPrimitive.Item>
    30→))
    31→RadioGroupItem.displayName = RadioGroupPrimitive.Item.displayName
    32→
    33→export { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem }
    34→

1→import i18n from "i18next"
     2→import { initReactI18next } from "react-i18next"
     3→import en from "./en.json"
     4→import zh from "./zh.json"
     5→
     6→i18n.use(initReactI18next).init({
     7→  resources: {
     8→    zh: { translation: zh },
     9→    en: { translation: en },
    10→  },
    11→  lng: "zh",
    12→  fallbackLng: "zh",
    13→  interpolation: {
    14→    escapeValue: false,
    15→  },
    16→})
    17→
    18→export default i18n
    19→

content.text:
---

Translation of your request: "You are implementing Task 14: Student-facing frontend pages."

---

**Status: DONE**

## What was implemented

Created all 9 files for the student-facing exam pages, plus i18n updates:

### Hooks (data layer)
- **`exam-web/src/hooks/use-exams.ts`** -- `useExamList`, `useExamDetail`, `useStartExam`, `useSubmitExam` hooks wrapping the student API endpoints with react-query
- **`exam-web/src/hooks/use-records.ts`** -- `useRecordList`, `useRecordDetail` hooks for exam records

### Components
- **`exam-web/src/components/exam-card.tsx`** -- Card component showing exam title, status badge, question count, time limit, remaining attempts with lucide-react icons
- **`exam-web/src/components/countdown-timer.tsx`** -- MM:SS countdown timer with red pulse animation under 60s, auto-calls `onTimeUp()` at zero, prevents double-fire via ref

### Route pages
- **`exam-web/src/routes/_layout/exams/index.tsx`** -- Grid layout (1/2/3 cols responsive), ExamCard list with pagination, empty state
- **`exam-web/src/routes/_layout/exams/$id.tsx`** -- Exam detail card with start button, disabled when `remainingAttempts === 0`, confirm dialog before starting, navigates to take page with state
- **`exam-web/src/routes/_layout/exams/$id.take.tsx`** -- Full exam-taking UI: top bar with title + countdown, question display with radio options (A/B/C/D), prev/next navigation, clickable question number grid (blue=answered, ring=current, gray=unanswered), submit confirm dialog, auto-submit on timeout, double-submit prevention via ref
- **`exam-web/src/routes/_layout/records/index.tsx`** -- Table view of exam records (title, score, status badge, time), clickable rows, pagination
- **`exam-web/src/routes/_layout/records/$id.tsx`** -- Record detail with score summary card, answer review list showing user answer highlighting (green correct / red wrong), correct answer indicator, analysis block

### i18n
- **`exam-web/src/i18n/zh.json`** -- Added `exam` namespace with all Chinese translations
- **`exam-web/src/i18n/en.json`** -- Added `exam` namespace with all English translations

## Key design decisions
- Followed existing project patterns (react-query hooks, sonner toast, shadcn/ui components, tanstack router file-based routing, i18n via `useTranslation()`)
- Used `window.history.state.usr` to pass exam data to the take page (TanStack Router location state), with redirect fallback if no state present
- Used `useRef` for both `onTimeUp` callback (to avoid stale closure) and `submittingRef` (to prevent double submit from timeout + manual click race)

## Files changed
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/hooks/use-exams.ts` (new)
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/hooks/use-records.ts` (new)
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/components/exam-card.tsx` (new)

- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/routes/_layout/exams/$id.tsx` (new)
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/routes/_layout/exams/$id.take.tsx` (new)
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/routes/_layout/records/index.tsx` (new)
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-web/src/routes/_layout/records/$id.tsx` (new)
